name: Spicy Shrimp Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Pickapepper sauce (Tabasco may be substituted)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and devein the shrimp.
2. In a bowl, mix together oil, Pickapepper sauce, preserves, honey, maple syrup, red pepper flakes, ground black pepper, basil, oregano, rosemary, and minced garlic.
3. Add the shrimp to the marinade and cover. Chill for at least 1 hour.
4. Remove the shrimp from the marinade, reserving the marinade for another use.
5. Thread the shrimp onto skewers.
6. Grill over medium heat until the shrimp turn white throughout. Be careful not to overcook, as this can make them tough and chewy.
